actions.value:
To view and manage your stakes within Edge:


Open Edge and tap 'View Assets'

- Next, scroll to and tap into the wallet with your staked funds

- Near the top, to right of the 'Receive' and 'Send' buttons for that asset, you will find the mint green button for 'Earn'

   (note: if only 'Receive' and 'Send' are showing, then staking is not available for this asset...yet)

- Tap into the Earn section, where you can Stake more or Unstake any percentage of your existing stake.

To view and manage your stakes within Edge:

Open Edge and tap 'View Assets'
- Next, scroll to and tap into the wallet with your staked funds
- Near the top, to right of the 'Receive' and 'Send' buttons for that asset, you will find the mint green button for 'Earn'
   (note: if only 'Receive' and 'Send' are showing, then staking is not available for this asset...yet)
- Tap into the Earn section, where you can Stake more or Unstake any percentage of your existing stake.
